case_title: MEX EXRESS, INC. VS. MACADAMIA, LLC.

docket_entries.description: ORDER RE: DISMISSED W/O PREJUDICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 7/29/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MEX EXRESS, INC.
ORDER CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO SEPTEMBER 25, 2018 AT 3:30PM.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF OR DEFENDANT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,434.31 FILED BY MEX EXRESS, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT MACADAMIA, LLC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-20-2018 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
